name: Fortune Cookies/Sherry
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix butter and sugar until well blended.
2. Add egg white, then mix in flour until a dough forms.
3. Press the dough into 3-inch outlines on a greased cookie sheet.
4. Bake at 400°F for 3-4 minutes (make a couple at a time).
5. Quickly shape the cookies by folding them while still warm.
6. Write fortunes on paper and place inside the cookies before sealing.
These are easy to make; just be careful when folding hot cookies, and remove them from the oven before they brown too much around the edges. They turn out very good.
